parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama3.2:3b",
  "prompt": "You are a SOC analyst.

Analyze the following Wazuh alert JSON and provide:
1) One-line incident summary
2) Severity (Low / Medium / High)
3) Why this alert matters

Wazuh Alert:
{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}",
  "stream": false
}
={{ $json.lineProtocol }}

parameters.body: =alerts,host=wazuh,severity="{{ $json.severity || 'unknown' }}",agent="{{ $json.agent && $json.agent.name ? $json.agent.name : 'unknown' }}",attack_type="{{ $json.ai_attack_type || 'unknown' }}",decision="{{ $json.decision || 'monitor' }}",source_ip="{{ $json.sourceIP || 'unknown' }}" rule_level={{ $json.rule && $json.rule.level ? $json.rule.level : 0 }},confidence={{ $json.ai_confidence || 0.5 }},auto_execute={{ $json.shouldAutoExecute ? 1 : 0 }}

==alerts,severity={{ $json.severity }},agent={{ $json.agent.name }},attack_type={{ $json.ai_attack_type }},decision={{ $json.decision }} rule_level={{ $json.rule.level }},confidence={{ $json.ai_confidence }},source_ip="{{ $json.sourceIP }}",description="{{ $json.description }}",ai_analysis="{{ $json.ai_analysis }}" {{ Math.floor(new Date($json.timestamp).getTime() / 1000) }}

from(bucket: "alerts")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

=from(bucket: "alerts") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source_ip == "{{ $('Extract IP Address').first().json.sourceIP }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rule_level") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> yield(name: "count")

=from(bucket: "alerts") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source_ip == "{{ $('Extract IP Address').first().json.sourceIP }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rule_level") |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1) |> yield(name: "last")

parameters.body: ={{ $json.lineProtocol }}

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { success: true, message: 'Alert processed and stored in InfluxDB', influxdb_written: true } };

parameters.body: =from(bucket: "alerts") |> range(start: -300s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telegram_sent") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source_ip == "{{ $('AI Decision Engine').first().json.sourceIP }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decision == "{{ $('AI Decision Engine').first().json.decision }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.agent == "{{ $('AI Decision Engine').first().json.agent?.name || 'unknown' }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sent") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> yield(name: "count")
